'''bawudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodrin|fodrin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodrin|fodrin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bawudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæwidith|bæwidith]] || [[word:bæwidij|bæwidij]] || [[word:bæwidish|bæwidish]] || [[word:bæwidi|bæwidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawuwuduth|bawuwuduth]] || [[word:bawuwuduj|bawuwuduj]] || [[word:bawuwudush|bawuwudush]] || [[word:bawuwudu|bawuwudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawuduth|bawuduth]] || [[word:bawuduj|bawuduj]] || [[word:bawudush|bawudush]] || [[word:bawudu|bawudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawufduth|bawufduth]] || [[word:bawufduj|bawufduj]] || [[word:bawufdush|bawufdush]] || [[word:bawufduf|bawufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bawuduthu|bawuduthu]] || [[word:bawuduju|bawuduju]] || [[word:bawudushu|bawudushu]] || [[word:bawuduku|bawuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bawuduth|bawuduth]] || [[word:bawuduj|bawuduj]] || [[word:bawudush|bawudush]] || [[word:bawudu|bawudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bawuduthul|bawuduthul]] || [[word:bawudujul|bawudujul]] || [[word:bawudushul|bawudushul]] || [[word:bawudukul|bawudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bawuduthuthu|bawuduthuthu]] || [[word:bawudujuju|bawudujuju]] || [[word:bawudushushu|bawudushushu]] || [[word:bawuduku|bawuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bawuduthun|bawuduthun]] || [[word:bawudujun|bawudujun]] || [[word:bawudushun|bawudushun]] || [[word:bawudukun|bawudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bawuduthuoro|bawuduthuoro]] || [[word:bawudujuoro|bawudujuoro]] || [[word:bawudushuoro|bawudushuoro]] || [[word:bawudukuoro|bawudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
